title: chenopodium × humiliforme
intro: Chenopodium × humiliforme is a hybrid plant species within the Chenopodium genus, resulting from a cross between Chenopodium album and Chenopodium pumilio. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Chenopodium × humiliforme include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fevers, and respiratory issues.
